name: Vertical Farming Production Cost
description: Cost per kilogram of leafy greens (lettuce equivalent) produced in indoor vertical farms. Captures declining costs from LED efficiency, automation, and scale.

data_points.source: Industry estimates — early vertical farms (Sky Greens Singapore, AeroFarms pilot) operating at very high cost
AeroFarms, Plenty — early commercial scale facilities; LED costs declining
Agritecture Consulting estimates — facility-level production costs for lettuce declining with larger facilities
80 Acres Farms, Bowery Farming — automation and LED improvements driving costs down
Indoor AgTech Innovation Summit reports — industry approaching $5-6/kg for lettuce at scale
Plenty Unlimited, AppHarvest reports — some facilities reaching $3.5-4.5/kg, though many still higher. AeroFarms bankruptcy shows difficulty.
Industry estimates — surviving operators optimizing; still ~3x conventional field lettuce cost (approx)
